name: cro-copywriting-mastery
description: The definitive CRO and copywriting system: customer research, benefit discovery, Big Idea positioning, page structure templates (landing pages, homepages, sales pages, opt-in pages), headlines and hooks, copy flow architecture, story-driven copywriting, email sequences, objection handling and persuasion psychology, CTA design, and testing/audit optimization. Synthesized from 13 expert courses and 547,000+ lines of practitioner knowledge.
